headline: Incyte (INCY) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Herve Hoppenot: Thank you, Ben, and good morning, everyone.  In addition to the consistent performance of Jakafi in 2024, we saw strong growth from our non-Jakafi revenue, primarily driven by Opzelura, highlighting our continuing revenue diversification.  2024, Jakafi net sales were $2.8 billion, growing 8% versus the prior year, with growth coming from all indications.

headline: Earnings Preview: Agios Pharmaceuticals (AGIO) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Agios Pharmaceuticals (AGIO) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
